mapper.select: SELECT CURRICULUM_ID, TITLE, INSTRUCTOR_ID, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT FROM CURRICULUM WHERE INSTRUCTOR_ID = #{instructorId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
SELECT CURRICULUM_ID, TITLE, INSTRUCTOR_ID, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT FROM CURRICULUM WHERE CURRICULUM_ID = #{curriculumId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CURRICULUM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CURRICULUM ( CURRICULUM_ID, TITLE, INSTRUCTOR_ID, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{curriculumId}, #{title}, #{instructorId}, 'Y', #{rgtrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastMdfrId}, SYSDATE )
